changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.ext:documentation: Adding the necessary extensions in order for TimescaleDB to work. These extensions must be executed with a superuser.

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.ext:documentation: Creating the necessary tables user management, authority, and tokens.

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.ext:documentation: Adding documentation for every table, column, and index.
